political.s: No available evidence of direct political donations or lobbying activities by C4 Energy or parent company Nutrabolt. Limited political engagement data in public records.

charity.s: C4 Energy demonstrates charitable commitment through multiple initiatives including $400,000 commitment to local sports teams via C4 Local Legends program, partnership with REORG supporting military personnel and first responders, and holiday giveaway programs supporting community heroes.
charity.focus: Sports development, military/veterans support, community engagement

environment.s: Parent company Nutrabolt partnered with Plastic Bank in 2022 to offset all plastic used in supply chain. Limited public environmental reporting; beverage industry standard environmental challenges around packaging and production.

labor.s: Limited publicly available labor data. Parent company Nutrabolt recognized as Top Workplace by Austin American-Statesman for fifth consecutive year and named Great Place to Work certified. No significant OSHA violations or labor disputes documented.

dei.s: No specific DEI initiatives or public statements available. Company marketing targets diverse demographic including expanding beyond core male demographic to include more female consumers.

animals.s: Not applicable for beverage company. Product does not involve animal testing.

guns.s: Not applicable. Beverage company with no firearms-related business.

privacy.s: Standard e-commerce privacy practices with cookie consent mechanisms on website. Limited transparency on data handling practices beyond standard privacy notices.

execPay.s: Not disclosed. Private company with no public SEC filings or executive compensation data available.
